title: South Korea says won still misaligned, sees relief coming in H2Mild verbal support for KRW
summary: South Korea says won still misaligned, sees relief coming in H2Mild verbal support for KRW
imageAlt: South Korea says won still misaligned, sees relief coming in H2Mild verbal support for KRW

multimedia.alt: South Korea says won still misaligned, sees relief coming in H2Mild verbal support for KRW
multimedia.caption: Imagen de portada del artículo

fullArticle: South Korea's forex authority said the dollar-won market remains out of step with the economy's fundamentals. It expects FX supply-demand dynamics to shift in the second half of 2026, as exporters' dollar holdings flow in through FX forwards. Authorities also said extended trading hours for the dollar-won market give them more room to act if stability is threatened....
